affected_pattern: International-roaming-heavy customers show $0 international charges despite active roaming usage in billing records
root_cause: Roaming partner rate-sheet not loaded for the current month — the inter-operator tariff file from the visited PLMN failed its signature-verification step and the rating engine silently fell back to a $0 rate for unrecognized operators.
supporting_evidence: Zero-Billing RCA Playbook: Missing Roaming Rate Sheet pattern
Rating engine warning log: 'partner-tariff-not-found, defaulting to 0.0'
TAP 3.12 rate file ingestion job failed silently for partner MCC 262
recommended_action: Reload and verify roaming rate sheet for MCC 262
Rerate all roaming billing records in the affected period
Fix rating engine to fail-closed (reject rather than $0) on missing partner rates
Add alerting when TAP file ingestion exits with non-zero status
